assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identified 4 ICs with proper types, 6 connectors, 33 total components on +12V/+5V/+3.3V power rails. UART nets (Rx/Tx/PI_RX/PI_TX) and I2C bus (unnamed SDA/SCL nets connected to 24C32 EEPROM) are both detected. 1-wire bus label is captured in the net list. The LM2576 buck regulator topology with L1 inductor and schottky diodes D2/D3 is present in BOM.
